name: Grilled Chicken with Warm Fruit Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel kiwifruit and cut into 1/4-inch thick slices. Cut the slices in half to form half circles.
2. Toss the kiwifruit rounds with strawberries, melon cubes, and tarragon in a mixing bowl.
3. Heat olive oil in a small saucepan. Stir in shallots; sauté until soft but not brown.
4. Stir in vinegar and pepper; heat until mixture boils.
5. Drizzle hot dressing over fruit, gently tossing to mix well.
6. Set fruit aside to marinate 1-2 hours.
7. Grill or broil chicken breasts until cooked through.
8. Spoon the fruit compote and juices over chicken just before serving.
9. Serve with hot cooked rice, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
